name: Waldorf Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package success white or brown rice; cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, toss apples with lemon juice.
2. Add cooked rice, celery, walnuts, and raisins to the bowl.
3. Mix sour cream, mayonnaise, and yogurt in a separate bowl.
4. Add the mixed sour cream, mayonnaise, and yogurt to the apple and rice mixture.
5. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
6. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 6 hours to allow flavors to meld.
